issues.description: Trigger type 'Trigger' is invalid. This is a [Main] card ability, should use 'Activated' trigger
SearchDeck action missing required filter conditions: must specify character names ([Sabo], [Portgas.D.Ace], [Monkey.D.Luffy]) and cost constraint (≤5). Current filter is empty 'Any'
SearchDeck missing 'limit' parameter: should be limited to 1 card maximum ('up to 1')
Missing action for deck ordering mechanic: 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' requires additional action or parameter not captured in current DSL
Missing initial setup: 'Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck' is not represented; SearchDeck should reference scoped pool of top 5 cards
